title: CopyID
description: A lightweight mod that instantly copies the item ID to clipboard when pressing F8 while hovering over an item.
body:
# Features:
- A lightweight mod that instantly copies the item ID to clipboard when pressing F8 while hovering over an item.

# Usage Method:
1. In the game's inventory storage GUI interface;
2. Hover the mouse pointer over an item;
3. Press the F8 key on the keyboard to copy the item ID to the system clipboard.

This mod is designed to assist data pack authors or mod developers in obtaining item IDs more conveniently and quickly.
